name: korbing-monorepo
description: Meal planning and shared shopping for households - Expo + FastAPI + Convex monorepo

scripts.check: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck
scripts.dev:backend: (docker info >/dev/null 2>&1 && pnpm db:ready) || echo 'Docker not running — skipping DB. Start Docker and run pnpm db:ready for /examples.' && dotenv -- turbo run dev --filter=!@korb/mobile
scripts.api:health: curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8001}/health >/dev/null && echo 'API OK' || (echo "API not reachable at http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8001}. Run: pnpm dev:backend" && exit 1)
scripts.contracts:generate: pnpm contracts:openapi && prettier --write apps/api/openapi.json && pnpm --filter @korb/contracts generate:api && prettier --write "packages/contracts/src/generated/api/**/*.ts"
scripts.db:migrate: dotenv -- node scripts/db-assert-local.mjs migrate && dotenv -- bash -c 'cd apps/api && uv run alembic upgrade head'
scripts.db:seed:qdrant: dotenv -- node scripts/db-assert-local.mjs seed:qdrant && dotenv -- node apps/qdrant/scripts/seed-qdrant.mjs
scripts.db:reset:postgres: docker compose -f compose.yml stop postgres && docker volume rm korb-db_postgres_data 2>/dev/null; docker compose -f compose.yml up -d postgres && sleep 4 && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed:postgres
scripts.db:reset:qdrant: docker compose -f compose.yml stop qdrant && docker volume rm korb-db_qdrant_data 2>/dev/null; docker compose -f compose.yml up -d qdrant && sleep 6 && pnpm db:seed:qdrant
